title: WAF Server-Side Template Injection Blocked
description: Detects Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) attempts blocked by WAF. Attackers inject template syntax to achieve remote code execution via template engines (Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker).
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and (('Request URL' like '*{{7*7}}*' or 'Request URL' like '*{{config}}*' or 'Request URL' like '*${7*7}*' or 'Request URL' like '*#{7*7}*' or 'Request URL' like '*<%= 7*7 %>*' or 'Request URL' like '*{{\'\'.__class__*' or 'Request URL' like '*__mro__*' or 'Request URL' like '*__subclasses__*' or 'Request URL' like '*__builtins__*' or 'Request URL' like '*__import__*' or 'Request URL' like '*lipsum.__globals__*' or 'Request URL' like '*cycler.__init__*' or 'Request URL' like '*joiner.__init__*' or 'Request URL' like '*request.application*' or 'Request URL' like '*${T(java.lang.Runtime)}*')))
